_doc: FROZEN GOLDEN — captured 2026-06-11 from the live SynthesisRunKind class (pre-deletion), F3 lote-2. Deep-equaled against the descriptor-synthesized port in test_lote2_descriptor_equivalence.py.

identity.docs: SynthesisRun = oneiric artefact. Surreal recombination of project memory (fragments lifted from LessonLearned/Story/ArchiveProposal/WorkflowEvent) + impossible juxtapositions + dominant affect + one captured symbol. NOT falseable, NOT a prediction. Pair with Forecast for the predictive dimension.

affect.description: Dominant emotional register of the dream.

belief_updates.description: Belief deltas the dream proposes. Each is a before/after pair with reasoning. Scribe downstream may apply, reject, or queue for human review.

reason.description: Why the shift — tie to source_event_ids.

target_ref.description: Optional Doc ref for the belief being updated (e.g. LessonLearned/X or specific spec field path).

confidence.description: Self-rated confidence in the dream's claims. 0.0 = pure imagination; 1.0 = ≥3 strong source_event_ids per claim + critic-pass clean. Used by ranker + clinical-guardrails.

contradictions.description: Detected contradictions between source_event_ids the dream surfaced. NOT auto-resolved — flagged for human or scribe arbitration.

echo.description: Engram slugs activated (resonance, not analytic weight).

fragments.description: 3-5 pieces of real project memory that got recombined to form the dream. Like ecforia cues.

lifted.description: Specific phrase or detail recombined into the dream.

insight_candidates.description: Discrete proposals to promote into StatusReport / LessonLearned / Skill via downstream scribes. Each item is independently rankable + verifiable.

speculation.description: True = goes beyond evidence. Marked for human review before promotion.

juxtapositions.description: Impossible / surreal combinations of fragments. Ex: 'rem-X encontra forget-Y e oferece uma troca.' Optional but encouraged.

lens.description: SynthesisRunLens.name used to frame this dream (e.g. 'hindsight-cf', 'future-projection', 'skill-extractor'). Null = generated from SynthesizerState voice alone.

owner.description: Slug reference to a Agent. When set, this SynthesisRun is PRIVATE to that agent (gerado a partir de LessonsLearned com mesmo owner). When null, the SynthesisRun is GENERAL. Phase: cognitive-reflection. S5 (dream-engines-v2): also matches a SynthesizerState.role when the dream came from hybrid-topn engine.

scenario.description: Imagistic prose, 3-6 sentences. The scene unfolding. Can have dialogue, surreal events, affect-loaded imagery. NOT a prediction or hedge.

skill_candidates.description: Voyager-style skill seeds. Each is a name + trigger condition + procedural sketch. skill-synthesis engine consumes these.

script.description: Procedural sketch (NOT executable). Voyager pattern — promote to real Skill via skill-synthesis.

source_event_ids.description: Doc refs of the memories this dream is grounded in. Required for every claim in insight_candidates + belief_updates. Provenance for critic-pass + eval-suite.

symbol.description: 1-line metaphor that captures the dream as a whole. Image-based, not analytic. Ex: 'A Feature corre por um corredor que se estreita sem fim.'

woke_thought.description: Optional. The single thought lingering on waking. Where reflection might begin, not a prediction.

belief_updates.after: descriptors are the safe default for records
belief_updates.reason: golden equivalence held across two batches

contradictions.conflict: frozen enum copies vs live shared helpers

juxtapositions: the ratchet eats its own allowlist
out.scenario: The registry walks a corridor of mirrors; each mirror holds a class that dissolves into YAML as it passes.

skill_candidates.applies_when: a record kind has no Tier-2 behavior
skill_candidates.name: migrate-record-kind

out.symbol: Onze classes derretem em um único arquivo de dados.
